# Feature Pull Request

**Feature Description**

> Describe the feature being added.

**Motivation**

> Why is this feature needed?

**Implementation Details**

> Explain how the feature works and important design decisions.

**Screenshots / Examples** (Optional)

![screenshot]()

**Breaking Changes**

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (describe below)



**Testing**

> How was the feature tested?

**Checklist**

- [ ] [`CLA`](https://github.com/Teamemories/Foxtension?tab=contributing-ov-file#contributing-to-foxtension) accepted.
- [ ] Documentation updated where necessary.
- [ ] Feature tested.
- [ ] Code follows project standards.
